title: Utozz Prime Brewery
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Utoz.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Consumers of [[Utoz/Legends|Utoz]]]]
'''Utozz Prime Brewery''' was a brewing corporation headquartered in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] on [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]] and that had offices located in the [[Elrood Bazaar]]. The company brewed [[Utozz]], a brand of the [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drink known as [[Utoz/Legends|Utoz]], during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It shared it's name with the [[Utozz Prime system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>
